passage_title: Preface to 'How the Other Half Thinks: Adventures in Mathematical Reasoning'

sentences.sentence: Occasionally, in some difficult musical compositions, there are beautiful, but easy parts—parts so simple a beginner could play them.
sentences.translation: 有时，在一些高难度的乐曲中，也会出现优美却简单的片段——简单到初学者都能演奏。

structure.text: there are beautiful, but easy parts
parts so simple a beginner could play them

difficult_points: there are 是存在句结构，真正介绍的是 beautiful, but easy parts。
破折号后的 parts... 是同位语，对前面的 parts 作进一步解释。
so simple 后省略了结果从句连接词 that，意为“简单到初学者都能演奏”。

expressions.text: so simple a beginner could play them
expressions.meaning_zh: 简单到初学者都能演奏

sentences.sentence: So it is with mathematics as well.
sentences.translation: 数学也是如此。
difficult_points: So it is with... 是固定倒装表达，表示“……也是如此”。
So 回指上句所说“困难作品中也有简单部分”这一情况。

sentences.sentence: There are some discoveries in advanced mathematics that do not depend on specialized knowledge, not even on algebra, geometry, or trigonometry.
sentences.translation: 高等数学中有些发现并不依赖专业知识，甚至不需要代数、几何或三角学知识。

structure.text: There are some discoveries in advanced mathematics
that do not depend on specialized knowledge
not even on algebra, geometry, or trigonometry

difficult_points: that 引导限制性定语从句，修饰 discoveries。
not even on... 承接 depend on，省略了重复的 depend。
specialized knowledge 先概括，随后用 algebra、geometry 和 trigonometry 具体说明。

sentences.sentence: Instead they may involve, at most, a little arithmetic, such as 'the sum of two odd numbers is even', and common sense.
sentences.translation: 相反，它们至多只涉及一点算术，例如“两个奇数之和是偶数”，再加上一些常识。

structure.text: such as 'the sum of two odd numbers is even', and common sense

difficult_points: they 指代上句中的 some discoveries。
at most 是插入成分，限定所需知识的最高程度。
such as 后的引语举例说明 arithmetic，and common sense 则与 a little arithmetic 并列。

sentences.sentence: Each of the eight chapters in this book illustrates this phenomenon.
sentences.translation: 本书八章中的每一章都展示了这一现象。

structure.text: Each of the eight chapters in this book

difficult_points: Each of 后接复数名词，但主语中心词 Each 为单数，因此谓语用 illustrates。
this phenomenon 指前文所述“高等数学中也有无需专业知识即可理解的发现”。

sentences.sentence: Anyone can understand every step in the reasoning.
sentences.translation: 任何人都能理解推理过程中的每一步。
difficult_points: Anyone 表示“不论是谁”，与 can 连用强调普遍可理解性。
in the reasoning 后置修饰 every step，指推理过程中的每一个环节。

sentences.sentence: The thinking in each chapter uses at most only elementary arithmetic, and sometimes not even that.
sentences.translation: 每一章所用的思维至多只需要基础算术，有时甚至连基础算术也不需要。
difficult_points: in each chapter 后置修饰 thinking，而不是修饰谓语 uses。
that 指代 elementary arithmetic，避免重复。
not even that 是省略结构，完整含义是 sometimes the thinking does not even use elementary arithmetic。

sentences.sentence: Thus all readers will have the chance to participate in a mathematical experience, to appreciate the beauty of mathematics, and to become familiar with its logical, yet intuitive, style of thinking.
sentences.translation: 因此，所有读者都有机会亲身参与数学体验，欣赏数学之美，并熟悉它既合乎逻辑又富于直觉的思维方式。

structure.text: to participate in a mathematical experience
to appreciate the beauty of mathematics
to become familiar with its logical, yet intuitive, style of thinking

difficult_points: 三个 to do 结构并列，共同说明 the chance 的具体内容。
its 指代 mathematics。
logical, yet intuitive 用 yet 表示看似相反的两种特点同时存在。

sentences.sentence: One of my purposes in writing this book is to give readers who haven't had the opportunity to see and enjoy real mathematics the chance to appreciate the mathematical way of thinking.
sentences.translation: 我写这本书的目的之一，是让那些过去没有机会接触并享受真正数学的读者，有机会领略数学的思维方式。

structure.text: One of my purposes in writing this book
to give readers who haven't had the opportunity to see and enjoy real mathematics the chance
who haven't had the opportunity to see and enjoy real mathematics
to appreciate the mathematical way of thinking

difficult_points: 主干是 One of my purposes... is to give readers the chance。
who 引导定语从句，修饰 readers；其中 to see and enjoy... 修饰 opportunity。
give readers the chance 是双宾语结构，末尾的不定式说明 chance 的内容。

sentences.sentence: I want to reveal not only some of the fascinating discoveries, but, more importantly, the reasoning behind them.
sentences.translation: 我不仅想展示一些引人入胜的发现，更重要的是，还想揭示这些发现背后的推理。

structure.text: not only some of the fascinating discoveries
but, more importantly, the reasoning behind them

difficult_points: not only... but... 连接两个并列宾语：discoveries 和 reasoning。
more importantly 是插入语，突出第二项才是作者更看重的内容。
them 指代 fascinating discoveries。

sentences.sentence: In that respect, this book differs from most books on mathematics written for the general public.
sentences.translation: 在这一点上，本书不同于大多数面向普通大众撰写的数学书籍。
difficult_points: that respect 回指作者重在呈现数学推理，而不只是介绍发现。
written for the general public 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 books on mathematics。

sentences.sentence: Some present the lives of colorful mathematicians.
sentences.translation: 有些书介绍富有传奇色彩的数学家的生平。
difficult_points: Some 是代词，指代上句中的 some books on mathematics。
colorful 在此不是“色彩鲜艳的”，而是形容人物经历丰富、有传奇色彩。

sentences.sentence: Others describe important applications of mathematics.
sentences.translation: 另一些书则描述数学的重要应用。
difficult_points: Others 与前句 Some 呼应，表示“另一些书”。
applications of mathematics 表示数学在其他领域中的实际运用。

sentences.sentence: Yet others go into mathematical procedures, but assume that the reader is adept in using algebra.
sentences.translation: 还有一些书会深入讲解数学步骤，却假定读者已经熟练掌握代数。

structure.text: that the reader is adept in using algebra

difficult_points: Yet others 延续 Some... Others... 的列举，意为“还有另一些书”。
but 连接同一主语的两个谓语 go into 与 assume，并带有转折意味。
that 引导 assume 的宾语从句；be adept in 表示“擅长、熟练”。

sentences.sentence: I hope this book will help bridge that notorious gap that separates the two cultures: the humanities and the sciences, or should I say the right brain (intuitive) and the left brain (analytical, numerical).
sentences.translation: 我希望本书能帮助弥合那道众所周知的鸿沟——它将两种文化分隔开来：人文与科学，或者更准确地说，直觉型的右脑与分析、数字型的左脑。

structure.text: this book will help bridge that notorious gap
or should I say the right brain (intuitive) and the left brain (analytical, numerical)

difficult_points: hope 后省略了宾语从句连接词 that，从句主语是 this book。
第二个 that 引导定语从句，修饰 notorious gap。
冒号后的 the humanities and the sciences 是 the two cultures 的同位解释。
should I say 是疑问式插入语，用来修正并更精确地表述前面的说法。

sentences.sentence: As the chapters will illustrate, mathematics is not restricted to the analytical and numerical; intuition plays a significant role.
sentences.translation: 正如各章将要说明的，数学并不局限于分析和数字；直觉也发挥着重要作用。

structure.text: is not restricted to the analytical and numerical

difficult_points: As 引导方式从句，意为“正如……将说明的那样”。
the analytical and numerical 是“the + 形容词”结构，名词化后指分析与数字层面。
分号连接两个意义紧密的独立分句，后句补充说明直觉的重要性。

sentences.sentence: The alleged gap can be narrowed or completely overcome by anyone, in part because each of us is far from using the full capacity of either side of the brain.
sentences.translation: 这道所谓的鸿沟，任何人都可以缩小甚至完全跨越，部分原因在于我们每个人都远未充分运用大脑任何一侧的全部能力。

structure.text: can be narrowed or completely overcome
because each of us is far from using the full capacity of either side of the brain
using the full capacity of either side of the brain

difficult_points: can be narrowed or... overcome 是情态动词后的并列被动结构。
because 引导原因状语从句，解释为何这道鸿沟能够被跨越。
be far from doing 表示“远未做到”，不是空间上的距离。
either side of the brain 在否定含义的语境中表示大脑两侧的任何一侧。

sentences.sentence: To illustrate our human potential, I cite a structural engineer who is an artist, an electrical engineer who is an opera singer, an opera singer who published mathematical research, and a mathematician who publishes short stories.
sentences.translation: 为了说明人的潜能，我举了几个例子：一位兼具艺术家身份的结构工程师、一位唱歌剧的电气工程师、一位发表过数学研究的歌剧演员，以及一位发表短篇小说的数学家。

structure.text: a structural engineer who is an artist
an electrical engineer who is an opera singer, an opera singer who published mathematical research, and a mathematician who publishes short stories

difficult_points: 句首不定式 To illustrate... 表示目的。
cite 后接四个并列的人物例子，每个职业名词后都有 who 引导的定语从句。
四个例子把通常分属科学与人文艺术的身份组合起来，具体支撑前文观点。

sentences.sentence: Other scientists have written books to explain their fields to non-scientists, but have necessarily had to omit the mathematics, although it provides the foundation of their theories.
sentences.translation: 其他科学家也写过向非科学人士解释自身领域的书，但他们不得不省略其中的数学，尽管数学构成了其理论的基础。

structure.text: to explain their fields to non-scientists
but have necessarily had to omit the mathematics
although it provides the foundation of their theories

difficult_points: to explain... 是目的状语，说明科学家写书的目的。
but 后省略了重复主语 Other scientists，并用 have had to 表示一直不得不如此。
although 引导让步状语从句，其中 it 指代 the mathematics。
their theories 中 their 指这些科学家各自领域的理论。

sentences.sentence: The reader must remain a tantalized spectator rather than an involved participant, since the appropriate language for describing the details in much of science is mathematics, whether the subject is expanding universe, subatomic particles, or chromosomes.
sentences.translation: 读者只能做一个心痒难耐的旁观者，而无法成为亲自参与者，因为描述许多科学领域细节的恰当语言是数学，无论主题是膨胀的宇宙、亚原子粒子还是染色体。

structure.text: a tantalized spectator rather than an involved participant
since the appropriate language for describing the details in much of science is mathematics
for describing the details in much of science
whether the subject is expanding universe, subatomic particles, or chromosomes

difficult_points: rather than 连接两个对比的表语 spectator 与 participant。
since 引导原因状语从句，说明读者无法深入参与的原因。
for describing... 后置修饰 language，其中 in much of science 修饰 details。
whether... or... 表示无论研究主题属于列举中的哪一种情况。

sentences.sentence: Though the broad outline of a scientific theory can be sketched intuitively, when a part of the physical universe is finally understood, its description often looks like a page in a mathematics text.
sentences.translation: 虽然科学理论的大致轮廓可以凭直觉勾勒出来，但当物质宇宙的某一部分最终得到理解时，对它的描述往往看起来就像数学课本中的一页。

structure.text: Though the broad outline of a scientific theory can be sketched intuitively
when a part of the physical universe is finally understood
a part of the physical universe
often looks like a page in a mathematics text

difficult_points: Though 引导让步状语从句，与主句形成“虽可直观概述，但精确描述仍是数学形式”的对照。
when 引导时间状语从句，位于让步从句和主句之间。
its 指代 a part of the physical universe。
can be sketched 和 is... understood 都是被动语态。

sentences.sentence: Still, the non-mathematical reader can go far in understanding mathematical reasoning.
sentences.translation: 尽管如此，不具备数学背景的读者仍然可以相当深入地理解数学推理。
difficult_points: Still 是连接副词，承接上段并引出转折，不是从句连接词。
go far in doing 是比喻表达，指在某方面取得很大进展或达到较深程度。
non-mathematical reader 指不具备数学专业背景的读者。

sentences.sentence: This book presents the details that illustrate the mathematical style of thinking, which involves sustained, step-by-step analysis, experiments, and insights.
sentences.translation: 本书呈现了体现数学思维方式的细节，而这种思维方式包含持续的、循序渐进的分析、实验和洞见。

structure.text: that illustrate the mathematical style of thinking
which involves sustained, step-by-step analysis, experiments, and insights

difficult_points: that 引导限制性定语从句，修饰 details。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，语义上指代 the mathematical style of thinking。
sustained 和 step-by-step 共同修饰 analysis，experiments 与 insights 则和 analysis 并列。

sentences.sentence: You will turn these pages much more slowly than when reading a novel or a newspaper.
sentences.translation: 你翻阅这些书页的速度，会比阅读小说或报纸时慢得多。

structure.text: than when reading a novel or a newspaper
when reading a novel or a newspaper

difficult_points: much 修饰比较级 more slowly，强调慢得多。
than 后的 when reading... 是省略结构，可理解为 than you do when you are reading...。
turn these pages 在语境中指阅读并逐页推进，而不只是机械翻页。

sentences.sentence: It may help to have a pencil and paper ready to check claims and carry out experiments.
sentences.translation: 备好纸笔，以便核验书中的论断并亲手做实验，可能会有所帮助。

structure.text: to have a pencil and paper ready
to check claims and carry out experiments

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正的主语是 to have a pencil and paper ready。
have + 宾语 + ready 表示“把……准备好”。
to check... and carry out... 表示备好纸笔的目的，两个动词短语并列。

sentences.sentence: As I wrote, I kept in mind two types of readers: those who enjoyed mathematics until they were turned off by an unpleasant episode, usually around fifth grade, and mathematics aficionados, who will find much that is new throughout the book.
sentences.translation: 写作时，我心里始终想着两类读者：一类人原本喜欢数学，直到通常在五年级左右的一次不愉快经历使他们失去兴趣；另一类是数学爱好者，他们会在全书中发现许多新内容。

structure.text: I kept in mind two types of readers
those who enjoyed mathematics until they were turned off by an unpleasant episode
until they were turned off by an unpleasant episode
mathematics aficionados, who will find much that is new throughout the book

difficult_points: As I wrote 是时间状语从句，表示“在我写作时”。
冒号后列出 two types of readers：those... 与 mathematics aficionados。
be turned off by 在此表示因不愉快经历而对数学失去兴趣。
who will find... 是非限制性定语从句，修饰 mathematics aficionados；其中 that is new 修饰 much。

sentences.sentence: This book also serves readers who simply want to sharpen their analytical skills.
sentences.translation: 本书也适合那些只是想提升分析能力的读者。

structure.text: who simply want to sharpen their analytical skills

difficult_points: serve 在此意为“满足……的需要、适合……”，不是“服务某人”的狭义用法。
who 引导定语从句，限定 readers。
want 后接不定式 to sharpen... 作宾语。

sentences.sentence: Many careers, such as law and medicine, require extended, precise analysis.
sentences.translation: 许多职业，例如法律和医学，都需要长时间而精确的分析。
difficult_points: such as law and medicine 是插入的举例成分，说明 careers 的具体类型。
extended 在此表示分析需要持续、深入展开，而非空间上的“延长”。

sentences.sentence: Each chapter offers practice in following a sustained and closely argued line of thought.
sentences.translation: 每一章都提供练习，让读者学习跟随一条持续展开且论证严密的思路。

structure.text: in following a sustained and closely argued line of thought
a sustained and closely argued line of thought

difficult_points: practice in doing 表示“在做某事方面的练习”。
sustained 和 closely argued 都修饰 line of thought，分别强调思路连贯展开与论证严密。
following 在此表示理解并跟上论证进程。

sentences.sentence: That mathematics can develop this skill is shown by these two testimonials:
sentences.translation: 以下两则亲身证明表明，数学能够培养这种能力：

structure.text: That mathematics can develop this skill

difficult_points: That 引导主语从句，整个从句充当 is shown 的主语。
this skill 指前文的 analytical skills，尤其是持续而精确地分析论证的能力。
is shown by 是被动结构，冒号表示后文将给出两则具体证明。

sentences.sentence: A physician wrote, 'The discipline of analytical thought processes [in mathematics] prepared me extremely well for medical school.
sentences.translation: 一位医生写道：“数学中分析性思维过程的训练，使我为医学院的学习做好了极为充分的准备。

structure.text: The discipline of analytical thought processes [in mathematics]

difficult_points: A physician wrote 是引述分句，逗号后进入直接引语。
主语中心词是 discipline，of analytical thought processes 说明训练的内容。
prepare someone for something 表示“使某人为某事做好准备”。

expressions.meaning_zh: 使某人为……做好充分准备

sentences.sentence: In medicine one is faced with a problem which must be thoroughly analyzed before a solution can be found.
sentences.translation: 在医学中，人们会面对一个问题，而必须先对其进行彻底分析，之后才能找到解决办法。

structure.text: before a solution can be found

difficult_points: one 是泛指代词，表示医学工作者或一般人在此情境中的经历。
which 引导定语从句，修饰 problem。
must be... analyzed 与 can be found 都是被动语态。
before 引导时间状语从句，强调分析先于找到解决方案。

sentences.sentence: The process is similar to doing mathematics.'
sentences.translation: 这个过程与做数学题很相似。”
difficult_points: The process 指上句所述“分析问题后寻找解决方案”的过程。
be similar to 中 to 是介词，因此后接动名词 doing，而非动词原形。
句末单引号关闭从 G-01 开始的医生引语。

expressions.meaning_zh: 进行数学推理；做数学题

sentences.sentence: A lawyer made the same point, 'Although I had no background in law—not even one political science course—I did well at one of the best law schools.
sentences.translation: 一位律师表达了同样的观点：“虽然我没有任何法律背景——甚至连一门政治学课程都没上过——但我在一所顶尖法学院表现出色。

structure.text: A lawyer made the same point
Although I had no background in law—not even one political science course
not even one political science course
at one of the best law schools

difficult_points: made the same point 表示律师的证言与医生的观点一致。
Although 引导让步状语从句，与主句 I did well... 形成反差。
破折号后的 not even... 补充并强化 no background in law。
one of 后接复数 law schools，表示顶尖法学院之一。

sentences.sentence: I attribute much of my success there to having learned, through the study of mathematics, and, in particular, theorems, how to analyze complicated principles.
sentences.translation: 我把自己在那里取得的大部分成功，归因于通过学习数学，尤其是学习定理，掌握了分析复杂原理的方法。

structure.text: through the study of mathematics, and, in particular, theorems

difficult_points: attribute A to B 表示“把 A 归因于 B”，to 是介词，后接 having learned。
there 指代上句中的 one of the best law schools。
through... 是方式状语，in particular theorems 进一步突出数学学习中的定理。
how to analyze... 是“疑问词 + 不定式”结构，作 learned 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: Lawyers who have studied mathematics can master the legal principles in a way that most others cannot.'
sentences.translation: 学过数学的律师能够以大多数其他人做不到的方式掌握法律原则。”
difficult_points: 第一个 who 引导定语从句，限定 Lawyers。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 way。
most others 指大多数其他未受数学训练的人；cannot 后省略了重复的 master the legal principles in that way。
句末单引号关闭从 G-04 开始的律师引语。

sentences.sentence: I hope you will share my delight in watching as simple, even naive, questions lead to remarkable solutions and purely theoretical discoveries find unanticipated applications.
sentences.translation: 我希望你也能分享我的喜悦，看着简单甚至天真的问题引出非凡的解决方案，纯理论的发现获得意想不到的应用。

structure.text: as simple, even naive, questions lead to remarkable solutions
purely theoretical discoveries find unanticipated applications

difficult_points: hope 后省略 that，you will share... 是宾语从句。
in watching 中 in 是介词，watching 后接两个省略连接词 that 的感官动词宾语补足结构。
as 引导伴随情境，表示作者在观看这些变化发生时感到喜悦。
questions lead to solutions 与 discoveries find applications 是两个并列的“主语 + 动词 + 宾语”结构。
